title: carthamus tenuis subsp. tenuis
intro: Carthamus tenuis subsp. tenuis, also known as the slender santonica, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain santonin, a natural insecticide and anti-parasitic compound. The health benefits of Carthamus tenuis subsp. tenuis include its use in treating intestinal worms and other parasitic infections, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Carthamus tenuis subsp. tenuis can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully explore its therapeutic applications.
